{{Quote|I'm pregnant, not hamstrung. You think it would be better for our kid if I spent all day lying around sucking on oorp?|Mara Jade Skywalker|audio=MaraJade-Oorp-EoV2.flac|<ref name="EoV2" />}}
'''Oorp''' was a healthy but bland liquid [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] supplement developed for [[Reproduction/Legends|pregnant]] beings.<ref name="CSWE" /> While pregnant<ref name="EoV2" /> in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] dismissed her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] concerns about how far she could walk on an artificial beach on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], questioning if he really thought it would be better for their [[Ben Skywalker|child]] for her to sit around sucking on oorp instead.<ref name="EoV2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Oorp was first mentioned in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'', which was written by [[Greg Keyes]] and released in [[2001]] as the second book in the ''[[Edge of Victory Duology]]'', a part of the wider ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' series of novels.<ref name="EoV2" />
